working_on: Issue #31 — HNSW divergence detection (wire probe to upstream repair-status) + non-destructive restoration via direct-chromadb-rebuild on scratch copy + live swap if successful + doc warnings + upstream tracker. Campaign session S-B.
outcome_summary: Vector search restored. Closed Issue #31 with expanded scope: wired probe_palace.py to upstream's read-only `mempalace repair-status` for divergence detection (validator gains soft-warn `mempalace_hnsw_divergence` at >=10%, LOUD at >=30%); authored engine/tools/mempalace_rebuild_hnsw.py for non-destructive direct chromadb rebuild bypassing the destructive `mempalace repair --mode legacy`. Pre-rebuild live: 46,853 SQLite / 33,243 HNSW (29% diverged). Post-rebuild live: status OK (46,853 / 46,000, within upstream's flush-lag tolerance). MCP `mempalace_search` returns semantic results with similarity/distance fields populated. CoreML acceleration cut throughput from ~3s/drawer (CPU) to ~50ms/drawer; 46,853 drawers rebuilt in 61.5 min. Atomic-rename swap to live; 66 session-internal captures preserved in palace.S-0084-stale; canonical safety anchor at palace.S-0084-pre. Upstream tracker filed: MemPalace/mempalace#1394. Per-user-directive version-pin sweep stripped 3.3.x from active prose; pinned only in requirements.txt (>=3.3.4). Stale 'BM25 fallback works' guidance scrubbed across validate.py / probe_palace.py / tools-validate-interpretation.md to make rebuild action the framing instead of 'live with the divergence.' 11 pytests pass.
declared_scope: Resolve Issue #31: wire engine/tools/probe_palace.py to upstream `mempalace repair-status` for HNSW divergence detection; author engine/tools/mempalace_rebuild_hnsw.py for non-destructive direct-chromadb-rebuild; test on a scratch palace copy and atomically swap to live only on 0% divergence; update mempalace-operations.md, health-check.md, ADR 0045, and (per user directive) sweep version-pin prose so 3.3.4 lives only in requirements.txt; file an upstream MemPalace bug for the 99.7% loss pattern observed at S-0078.

scope_delivery.explanation: Plan delivered all named scope: detection wiring (probe + validator + tests), non-destructive restoration tool with CoreML acceleration, scratch rebuild + atomic-rename live swap, doc updates (mempalace-operations.md / health-check.md / ADR 0045 / tools-validate-interpretation.md), upstream tracker filed (MemPalace/mempalace#1394), version-pin sweep per user directive, BM25 stale-guidance scrub per user directive surfaced late in session. Vector search confirmed restored via post-swap MCP search returning semantic results.
